controls.description_en: A cybersecurity strategy must be defined, documented and approved. It must be supported by the head of the organization or his/her delegate (referred to in this document as Authorizing Official). The strategy goals must be in-line with related laws and regulations.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] A cybersecurity strategy must be defined, documented and approved. It must be supported by the head of the organization or his/her delegate (referred to in this document as Authorizing Official). The strategy goals must be in-line with related laws and regulations.
evidence_examples: Cybersecurity strategy document signed by Authorizing Official

controls.description_en: A roadmap must be executed to implement the cybersecurity strategy.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] A roadmap must be executed to implement the cybersecurity strategy.
evidence_examples: Cybersecurity roadmap with milestones and timelines

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity strategy must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity strategy must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations.
evidence_examples: Updated strategy documents with version control

controls.description_en: A dedicated cybersecurity function (e.g., division, department) must be established within the organization. This function must be independent from the Information Technology/Information Communication and Technology (IT/ICT) functions (as per the Royal Decree number 37140 dated 14/8/1438H). It is highly recommended that this function reports directly to the head of the organization or his/her delegate while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] A dedicated cybersecurity function (e.g., division, department) must be established within the organization. This function must be independent from the Information Technology/Information Communication and Technology (IT/ICT) functions (as per the Royal Decree number 37140 dated 14/8/1438H). It is highly recommended that this function reports directly to the head of the organization or his/her delegate while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest.

controls.description_en: The position of cybersecurity function head (e.g., CISO), and related supervisory and critical positions within the function, must be filled with full-time and experienced Saudi cybersecurity professionals.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The position of cybersecurity function head (e.g., CISO), and related supervisory and critical positions within the function, must be filled with full-time and experienced Saudi cybersecurity professionals.
evidence_examples: CV and certifications of Saudi cybersecurity professionals

controls.description_en: A cybersecurity steering committee must be established by the Authorizing Official to ensure the support and implementation of the cybersecurity programs and initiatives within the organization. Committee members, roles and responsibilities, and governance framework must be defined, documented and approved. The committee must include the head of the cybersecurity function as one of its members. It is highly recommended that the committee reports directly to the head of the organization or his/her delegate while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] A cybersecurity steering committee must be established by the Authorizing Official to ensure the support and implementation of the cybersecurity programs and initiatives within the organization. Committee members, roles and responsibilities, and governance framework must be defined, documented and approved. The committee must include the head of the cybersecurity function as one of its members. It is highly recommended that the committee reports directly to the head of the organization or his/her delegate while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity policies and procedures must be defined and documented by the cybersecurity function, approved by the Authorizing Official, and disseminated to relevant parties inside and outside the organization.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity policies and procedures must be defined and documented by the cybersecurity function, approved by the Authorizing Official, and disseminated to relevant parties inside and outside the organization.
evidence_examples: Policy and procedure documents with approval signatures
mapping_ccc: training sessions); Acknowledgment receipts from staff

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity function must ensure that the cybersecurity policies and procedures are implemented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity function must ensure that the cybersecurity policies and procedures are implemented.
mapping_ccc: access logs); Compliance audit reports; Gap analysis reports

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity policies and procedures must be supported by technical security standards (e.g., operating systems, databases and firewall technical security standards).
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity policies and procedures must be supported by technical security standards (e.g., operating systems, databases and firewall technical security standards).

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity policies and procedures must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations. Changes and reviews must be approved and documented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity policies and procedures must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations. Changes and reviews must be approved and documented.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity organizational structure and related roles and responsibilities must be defined, documented, approved, supported and assigned by the Authorizing Official while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity organizational structure and related roles and responsibilities must be defined, documented, approved, supported and assigned by the Authorizing Official while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity roles and responsibilities must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity roles and responsibilities must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity risk management methodology and procedures must be defined, documented and approved as per confidentiality, integrity and availability considerations of information and technology assets.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity risk management methodology and procedures must be defined, documented and approved as per confidentiality, integrity and availability considerations of information and technology assets.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity risk management methodology and procedures must be implemented by the cybersecurity function.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity risk management methodology and procedures must be implemented by the cybersecurity function.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity risk assessment procedures must be implemented at least in the following cases: Early stages of technology projects; Before making major changes to technology infrastructure; During the planning phase of obtaining third party services; During the planning phase and before going live for new technology services and products.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity risk assessment procedures must be implemented at least in the following cases: Early stages of technology projects; Before making major changes to technology infrastructure; During the planning phase of obtaining third party services; During the planning phase and before going live for new technology services and products.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity risk management methodology and procedures must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations. Changes and reviews must be approved and documented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity risk management methodology and procedures must be reviewed periodically according to planned intervals or upon changes to related laws and regulations. Changes and reviews must be approved and documented.

controls.subdomain: 1-6 Cybersecurity in Information and Technology Project Management
controls.subdomain_ar: 1-6 الأمن السيبراني في إدارة مشاريع المعلومات والتقنية
controls.description_en: Cybersecurity requirements must be included in project and asset (information/ technology) change management methodology and procedures to identify and manage cybersecurity risks as part of project management lifecycle. The cybersecurity requirements must be a key part of the overall requirements of technology projects.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity requirements must be included in project and asset (information/ technology) change management methodology and procedures to identify and manage cybersecurity risks as part of project management lifecycle. The cybersecurity requirements must be a key part of the overall requirements of technology projects.
evidence_examples: Project management methodology with cybersecurity integration
Project charter templates with cybersecurity requirements

controls.subdomain: 1-6 Cybersecurity in Information and Technology Project Management
controls.subdomain_ar: 1-6 الأمن السيبراني في إدارة مشاريع المعلومات والتقنية
controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements in project and assets (information/technology) change management must include at least the following: Vulnerability assessment and remediation; Conducting a configurations' review secure configuration and hardening and patching before changes or going live for technology projects.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements in project and assets (information/technology) change management must include at least the following: Vulnerability assessment and remediation; Conducting a configurations' review secure configuration and hardening and patching before changes or going live for technology projects.

controls.subdomain: 1-6 Cybersecurity in Information and Technology Project Management
controls.subdomain_ar: 1-6 الأمن السيبراني في إدارة مشاريع المعلومات والتقنية
controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements related to software and application development projects must include at least the following: Using secure coding standards; Using trusted and licensed sources for software development tools and libraries; Conducting compliance test for software against the defined organizational cybersecurity requirements; Secure integration between software components; Conducting a configurations' review secure configuration and hardening and patching before going live for software products.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements related to software and application development projects must include at least the following: Using secure coding standards; Using trusted and licensed sources for software development tools and libraries; Conducting compliance test for software against the defined organizational cybersecurity requirements; Secure integration between software components; Conducting a configurations' review secure configuration and hardening and patching before going live for software products.

controls.subdomain: 1-6 Cybersecurity in Information and Technology Project Management
controls.subdomain_ar: 1-6 الأمن السيبراني في إدارة مشاريع المعلومات والتقنية
controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements in project management must be reviewed periodically.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements in project management must be reviewed periodically.

controls.subdomain: 1-7 Compliance with Cybersecurity Standards Laws and Regulations
controls.subdomain_ar: 1-7 الامتثال لمعايير وقوانين ولوائح الأمن السيبراني
controls.title_en: Compliance with Standards Laws and Regulations - 1-7-1
controls.description_en: The organization must comply with related national cybersecurity laws and regulations.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The organization must comply with related national cybersecurity laws and regulations.
evidence_examples: Evidence of adherence to national cybersecurity laws

controls.subdomain: 1-7 Compliance with Cybersecurity Standards Laws and Regulations
controls.subdomain_ar: 1-7 الامتثال لمعايير وقوانين ولوائح الأمن السيبراني
controls.title_en: Compliance with Standards Laws and Regulations - 1-7-2
controls.description_en: The organization must comply with any nationally-approved international agreements and commiments related to cybersecurity.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The organization must comply with any nationally-approved international agreements and commiments related to cybersecurity.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity reviews must be conducted periodically by the cybersecurity function in the organization to assess the compliance with the cybersecurity controls in the organization.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity reviews must be conducted periodically by the cybersecurity function in the organization to assess the compliance with the cybersecurity controls in the organization.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity audits and reviews must be conducted by independent parties outside the cybersecurity function (e.g., Internal Audit function) to assess the compliance with the cybersecurity controls in the organization. Audits and reviews must be conducted independently, while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest, as per the Generally Accepted Auditing Standards (GAAS), and related laws and regulations.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity audits and reviews must be conducted by independent parties outside the cybersecurity function (e.g., Internal Audit function) to assess the compliance with the cybersecurity controls in the organization. Audits and reviews must be conducted independently, while ensuring that this does not result in a conflict of interest, as per the Generally Accepted Auditing Standards (GAAS), and related laws and regulations.

controls.description_en: Results from the cybersecurity audits and reviews must be documented and presented to the cybersecurity steering committee and Authorizing Official. Results must include the audit/review scope, observations, recommendations and remediation plans.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Results from the cybersecurity audits and reviews must be documented and presented to the cybersecurity steering committee and Authorizing Official. Results must include the audit/review scope, observations, recommendations and remediation plans.
evidence_examples: Committee meeting minutes with audit discussion

controls.description_en: Personnel cybersecurity requirements (prior to employment, during employment and after termination/separation) must be defined, documented and approved.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Personnel cybersecurity requirements (prior to employment, during employment and after termination/separation) must be defined, documented and approved.

controls.description_en: The personnel cybersecurity requirements must be implemented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The personnel cybersecurity requirements must be implemented.

controls.description_en: The personnel cybersecurity requirements prior to employment must include at least the following: Inclusion of personnel cybersecurity responsibilities and non-disclosure clauses (covering the cybersecurity requirements during employment and after termination/ separation) in employment contracts; Screening or vetting candidates of cybersecurity and critical/privileged positions.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The personnel cybersecurity requirements prior to employment must include at least the following: Inclusion of personnel cybersecurity responsibilities and non-disclosure clauses (covering the cybersecurity requirements during employment and after termination/ separation) in employment contracts; Screening or vetting candidates of cybersecurity and critical/privileged positions.
evidence_examples: Employment contracts with cybersecurity clauses and NDA
Background screening reports for critical positions

controls.description_en: The personnel cybersecurity requirements during employment must include at least the following: Cybersecurity awareness (during on-boarding and during employment); Implementation of and compliance with the cybersecurity requirements as per the organizational cybersecurity policies and procedures.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The personnel cybersecurity requirements during employment must include at least the following: Cybersecurity awareness (during on-boarding and during employment); Implementation of and compliance with the cybersecurity requirements as per the organizational cybersecurity policies and procedures.

controls.description_en: Personnel access to information and technology assets must be reviewed and removed immediately upon termination/separation.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Personnel access to information and technology assets must be reviewed and removed immediately upon termination/separation.
evidence_examples: Termination checklists with access revocation confirmation

controls.description_en: Personnel cybersecurity requirements must be reviewed periodically.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Personnel cybersecurity requirements must be reviewed periodically.

controls.description_en: A cybersecurity awareness program must be developed and approved. The program must be conducted periodically through multiple channels to strengthen the awareness about cybersecurity, cyber threats and risks, and to build a positive cybersecurity awareness culture.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] A cybersecurity awareness program must be developed and approved. The program must be conducted periodically through multiple channels to strengthen the awareness about cybersecurity, cyber threats and risks, and to build a positive cybersecurity awareness culture.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity awareness program must be implemented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity awareness program must be implemented.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity awareness program must cover the latest cyber threats and how to protect against them and must include at least the following subjects: Secure handling of email services especially phishing emails; Secure handling of mobile devices and storage media; Secure Internet browsing; Secure use of social media.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity awareness program must cover the latest cyber threats and how to protect against them and must include at least the following subjects: Secure handling of email services especially phishing emails; Secure handling of mobile devices and storage media; Secure Internet browsing; Secure use of social media.
evidence_examples: Social media security policy and training

controls.description_en: Essential and customized (i.e., tailored to job functions as it relates to cybersecurity) training and access to professional skillsets must be made available to personnel working directly on tasks related to cybersecurity including: Cybersecurity function's personnel; Personnel working on software/application development; and information and technology assets operations; Executive and supervisory positions.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Essential and customized (i.e., tailored to job functions as it relates to cybersecurity) training and access to professional skillsets must be made available to personnel working directly on tasks related to cybersecurity including: Cybersecurity function's personnel; Personnel working on software/application development; and information and technology assets operations; Executive and supervisory positions.

controls.description_en: The implementation of the cybersecurity awareness program must be reviewed periodically.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The implementation of the cybersecurity awareness program must be reviewed periodically.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity requirements for managing information and technology assets must be defined, documented and approved.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity requirements for managing information and technology assets must be defined, documented and approved.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements for managing information and technology assets must be implemented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements for managing information and technology assets must be implemented.

controls.description_en: Acceptable use policy of information and technology assets must be defined, documented and approved.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Acceptable use policy of information and technology assets must be defined, documented and approved.

controls.description_en: Acceptable use policy of information and technology assets must be implemented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Acceptable use policy of information and technology assets must be implemented.
evidence_examples: Incident reports related to AUP violations

controls.description_en: Information and technology assets must be classified, labeled and handled as per related law and regulatory requirements.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Information and technology assets must be classified, labeled and handled as per related law and regulatory requirements.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements for managing information and technology assets must be reviewed periodically.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements for managing information and technology assets must be reviewed periodically.

controls.description_en: Cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management must be defined, documented and approved.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] Cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management must be defined, documented and approved.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management must be implemented.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management must be implemented.

controls.description_en: The cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management must include at least the following: User authentication based on username and password; Multi-factor authentication for remote access; User authorization based on identity and access control principles: Need-to-Know and Need-to-Use Least Privilege and Segregation of Duties; Privileged access management.
controls.description_ar: [ECC] The cybersecurity requirements for identity and access management must include at least the following: User authentication based on username and password; Multi-factor authentication for remote access; User authorization based on identity and access control principles: Need-to-Know and Need-to-Use Least Privilege and Segregation of Duties; Privileged access management.
